12174186700000011


SELECT * FROM  icipru_popprd.pops_users as t1 left join icipru_popprd.pops_user_address_details as t2 on t1.pran=t2.pran and (t2.address_type is null or t2.address_type ='P' or  t2.address_type='C') where t1.pran='900000010222' ;
